creator: holler@ilektron.de
text:
compile of XF86Setup fails. TCLINCDIR and TKINCDIR aren't right.

Fix: 

Add /tk4.2 and /tcl7.5 to TKINCDIR and TCLINCDIR of the XF86Setup 
makefile.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/x11/tk42
make install
cd /usr/ports/lang/tcl75
make install
cd /usr/ports/x11/XFree86
make install
